subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath heard thy call - He Who hath summoned all unto God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting. Say: O peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع ندائک المظلوم الذی دعا الکل الی الله المهیمن القیوم قل یا ملا الارض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
